print("✅ Test Wallet Bot is starting...")

from telegram import Update, InlineKeyboardButton, InlineKeyboardMarkup
from telegram.ext import ApplicationBuilder, CommandHandler, CallbackQueryHandler, MessageHandler, ContextTypes, filters
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')

from prizespayout import (
    handle_wallet_start,
    handle_callback,
    process_owner_input,
    user_wallet_dm_handler,
    handle_update_wallet_callback
)

BOT_TOKEN = "7709391107:AAF3AUexdCUjBOqS07oBlNH_FTvDMjShmCY"
BOT_USERNAME = "highscoregamingtestbot"
OWNER_IDS = [5271319968]

# ------------------------
# Commands
# ------------------------
async def start(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    user = update.effective_user
    chat_type = update.effective_chat.type
    text = update.message.text or ""

    if chat_type == "private" and "settings-" in text:
        try:
            parts = text.split("settings-")
            if len(parts) > 1:
                chat_id_str = parts[1].strip().split()[0].replace("--", "-")
                chat_id = int(chat_id_str)
                context.user_data["last_wallet_chat_id"] = chat_id
                msg, kb = await handle_wallet_start(user, chat_id, context.bot)
                if msg:
                    await update.message.reply_text(msg, reply_markup=kb, parse_mode="HTML")
            else:
                raise ValueError("Start parameter ongeldig")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"❌ /start settings failed: {e}")
            await update.message.reply_text("❌ Invalid start link.")
    else:
        await update.message.reply_text("👋 Settings bot is online!")

async def settings(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    url = f"https://t.me/{BOT_USERNAME}?start=settings-{update.effective_chat.id}"
    keyboard = InlineKeyboardMarkup([[InlineKeyboardButton("⚙️ Link wallet", url=url)]])
    await update.message.reply_text(
        "Tap the button below to link your wallet in a private chat.",
        reply_markup=keyboard
    )

# ------------------------
# Setup
# ------------------------
def is_token_or_distribution(context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE) -> bool:
    return "awaiting_token" in context.user_data or "awaiting_distribution" in context.user_data

def main():
    app = ApplicationBuilder().token(BOT_TOKEN).build()

    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("start", start))
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("settings", settings))
    app.add_handler(MessageHandler(
        filters.ChatType.PRIVATE & filters.TEXT & ~filters.COMMAND, process_owner_input, block=False
    ))
    app.add_handler(MessageHandler(
        filters.ChatType.PRIVATE & filters.TEXT & ~filters.COMMAND, user_wallet_dm_handler, block=False
    ))
    app.add_handler(CallbackQueryHandler(handle_update_wallet_callback, pattern="^update_wallet_"))
    app.add_handler(CallbackQueryHandler(handle_callback, pattern=r".+\|.+"))

    print("🚀 Test Wallet Bot is running!")
    app.run_polling()

# ------------------------
# Entry point
# ------------------------
if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
